game_version: Limbus Company (structural facts; the 5 E.G.O grades are fixed)

entries.description: The lowest E.G.O grade, named after the Sephirah/risk-tier convention shared across Project Moon. E.G.O are equippable skills with a Sin-affinity resource cost and a corrosion threshold.
The second E.G.O grade, above ZAYIN and below HE.
The middle E.G.O grade, above TETH and below WAW.
The fourth E.G.O grade, above HE and below ALEPH.
The highest E.G.O grade, above WAW.
